query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, status, COUNT(CASE WHEN status != 'Inspection Passed' THEN 1 END) as non_inspection_passed FROM projects WHERE isArchived = 0 GROUP BY status;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dCz1QvnpntshJi7.root --database jvZMyWuKFNHBGfG95CC7gr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, status, COUNT(CASE WHEN status != 'Inspection Passed' THEN 1 END) as non_inspection_passed FROM projects WHERE isArchived = 0 GROUP BY status;
